narrative:
Parma Heights-01-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,187 registered voters, with 58.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.3%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.3 percentage points.
